positive: A stylized, maximalist illustration of a cosmic forest at twilight. The central subject is a whimsical, stylized bioluminescent mushroom patch growing on ancient, gnarled roots. Above, the sky is a deep gradient of indigo and violet, filled with stylized constellations and crescent moons. The foliage should be abstract, using bold silhouettes and high contrast. Elements include giant, stylized glowing jellyfish floating through the canopy, and geometric stardust particles falling like rain. The color palette is dominated by rich jewel tones (sapphire, amethyst, emerald) mixed with neon accents of cyan and electric lime. The style is modern, flat vector art meets ethereal lithograph, suitable for a high-contrast screen print. Centered, highly detailed, vibrant, forest floor perspective, full bleed, symmetrical composition.
negative: blurry, noise, grain, low resolution, bad anatomy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, messy, cluttered, logos, trademarks, cropped, extra limbs
